title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. elongatum
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. elongatum, also known as the White Star of Bethlehem, is a variety of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of steroidal saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. elongatum include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although proper identification and dosing are essential to ensure safe and effective use.
